title: Augmenting Auditor Judgment in High-Stakes Financial Compliance
conference: Led development of a hybrid AI system (classification + LLM) to support financial auditors in surfacing and prioritizing claims.

title: Aligning AI Agent Outputs with User Intent via Metacognitive Self-Adaptation
conference: Led the design, implementation, and evaluation of a metacognitive architecture integrating symbolic knowledge and LLMs. Deployed the architecture in a Knowledge-Based AI course with 500+ students.

title: VAL: Interactive Task Planning Interface
conference: Engineered a real-time interactive planning interface (React, WebSocket) for a neural-symbolic agent. Designed human-in-the-loop planning mechanisms to support transparent oversight.

title: Calibrating User Trust and Mitigating Overreliance Under LLM Inconsistency
conference: Designed experimental tasks for a controlled online experiment (N=252). Conducted statistical analysis (regression modeling, hypothesis testing in Python/R).

title: Sound Clouds: Participatory Music Generation
conference: Led the computer vision pipeline by fine-tuning YOLOv12n on a custom dataset and integrating it into a real-time GoPro streaming system, achieving an mAP@0.5 of 0.983. Deployed the system in an interactive installation with 200+ participants. Led survey design, data analysis, and visualization (N=35).

title: SlidesSierra: Supporting Professional Reflection through Critical AI Feedback
conference: Led the end-to-end design and implementation of a Google Slides add-on (Apps Script). Conducted an empirical study with 24 product managers.

title: Explainable Churn Prediction to Support Operational Decision-Making
conference: Developed an interpretable churn prediction model (XGBoost + SHAP) to support retention strategy and operational decision-making across business and service teams.

title: Real-Time Background Segmentation
conference: Developed a real-time background segmentation model (PyTorch) for Samsung’s enterprise video conferencing product. Enabled robust training on entirely unlabeled datasets by engineering a knowledge-distillation pipeline with a consistency loss.

title: LTE Network KPI Analysis
conference: Analyzed LTE eNB KPI data using PCA and Python to assess relationships among performance indicators.

title: FORECST: Online Hackathon Platform
conference: Led frontend development (React.js) for a full-stack virtual hackathon platform.

title: PINTOS: Operating System Implementation
conference: Implemented kernel threads, user programs, file system, and virtual memory in C on QEMU.

title: MYFIT: Clothing Size Recommendation App
conference: Built an end-to-end Android app (Java) in 1 week with team of 3 for clothing size visualization and recommendations.
